Task  
Angel has written letters to all of her pen pals and is putting all of the letters in envelopes. Most of the letters are put into large envelopes and the remaining 20 letters are put into small envelopes. The large envelopes each contain 2 letters each. If Angel has written a total of 80 letters, how many large envelopes did she use?  

Task  
The total number of letters is 80. The remaining 20 letters are in small envelopes. The large envelopes contain 2 letters each. The number of large envelopes is calculated by dividing the total letters by the number of letters per large envelope.  

Task  
The large envelopes each contain 2 letters. The total number of letters is 80. The number of large envelopes is calculated by dividing 80 by 2.  

Task  
The total number of letters is 80. The number of large envelopes is calculated by dividing 80 by 2.  

Task  
The number of large envelopes is 40.  

Task  
The number of large envelopes is 40.
